title.en: Everyone's eyes were on Ye Tian.

content.en:
Wow!

Everyone's eyes were on Ye Tian.

"It's just a master, and his tone is so big, people who don't know still think it's a supreme who is talking!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun sneered.

"Attack me!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun ordered.

He didn't make a move himself, because his men were enough to destroy the Yunlan Juggernaut and the others, and if there was an accident, it would not be too late for him to make another move.

The fifteen masters under the command of the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable, and the many cosmic gods, all took action against the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

After a round of attacks, the defensive formation began to crack.

"Attack again!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun ordered.

The second round of attacks came, completely shattering the defensive formation of the Yunmeng Mercenary Group.

"It's over!"

Yunlan dominates despair, although she still has some hole cards, she can't break the game at all.

"Even if you die, you have to kill a few people!"

Yunlan Juggernaut thought to herself.

But just when another round of attacks from the people of the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group came, it was as if the heavens and the earth were imprisoned.

"I said the farce should be over, you ...... It doesn't seem to take my words seriously!"

Ye Tian looked at it.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying soul power turned into big hands, grabbed the souls of the masters and the cosmic gods, and immediately pinched them gently.

Click!!

The souls of the Masters and the Universe Gods were crushed and all turned into corpses and fell to the ground.

In the blink of an eye, almost all of the Blood Wolf Mist Mercenary Group fell and died.

"What!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun was shocked.

These masters, cosmic gods, basically everyone has soul defense treasures, but they are still pinched by Ye Tian's soul, how terrifying is Ye Tian's soul strength.

"How can a master have such a terrifying soul power???"

Blood Wolf Tianzun couldn't believe it.

The only thing that reassures him is that he is Tianzun, his soul strength is much stronger than that of the master, and he has a top-level soul defense treasure, plus he has entered the mist area many times, and has obtained treasures that can refine the soul strength, so his soul strength is very strong, and he has the confidence to block Ye Tian's soul secret technique.

But he still didn't dare to underestimate Ye Tian, because Ye Tian was too confident.

He has always been very cautious and never underestimated any opponent, so he can live well in a chaotic place like the Sea of Chaos.

Underestimating the opponent means death.

"Die!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun directly used one of his hole cards.

It's a secret treasure—the Killing Spear!

This is a special secret treasure created by a top refining master, sealing the blow of the top supreme in the Killing Spear, once the Killing Spear is activated, it is enough to exert a terrifying blow.

He was just a fourth-rank Heavenly Venerable, but if he used the Killing Spear, he would even have the power to severely damage the third-rank Heavenly Venerable.

"Just a master, I don't believe that he has the strength of a third-rank Heavenly Venerable, even if he has the combat power of a third-class Heavenly Venerable, he will be severely injured under the attack of the Killing Zun Spear, and he is still not my opponent!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun said.

Rumble!!!!

The Killing Spear turned into a blood-colored spear, pierced through the void, and killed Ye Tian.

"Lord of the Heavens, this is the Killing Spear, get out of the way!"

Yunlan dominates and yells in despair.

However, for the average master, it is impossible to dodge at all, the speed of the Killing Spear is too fast, and it has the effect of sealing the void, and it is almost impossible to dodge.

Ye Tian could easily dodge, but he didn't dodge, if he dodged, these people from the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group would probably all die.

Moreover, he could only hit the third-rank Heavenly Venerable with a single blow, and he was not qualified to let him dodge.

I saw that Ye Tian used his fingers instead of the knife, and performed the first form of the Heavenly Sword system, the Tianyue Knife, and his fingers drew a crescent moon and collided with the Killing Spear.

Click!

The sound of the break sounded, it was not Ye Tian's finger that was broken, but the murdering spear!

"Impossible!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun's pupils shrank sharply, revealing an incredible look.

That's the Killing Spear, the hardness is comparable to the top treasure, how difficult it is to destroy the Killing Spear, and the Killing Spear contains a blow that recreates the third-class Heavenly Venerable, even the second-class Supreme can't break the Killing Spear with one finger!

"Could it be that he is the Hidden Supreme?" Blood Wolf Tianzun thought, "No, his cultivation is to dominate the extreme, even if he makes a move, his aura is still dominant!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun didn't think much about it, he knew that he had to escape, otherwise he would die!

Wow!

A pair of wings emerged from the back of the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable, this was the top-level arcana-floating wing, once the origin of the top-level arcana, it was enough to make his speed soar by more than ten times.

He was originally a Heavenly Venerable, and once his speed soared tenfold, even compared to the weaker Supreme, his speed would not be slow.

He was convinced that he could escape!

Swish!

Blood Wolf Tianzun turned into a ray of light and flew away.

"In front of me, you still want to escape?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Then, he turned into a constant light and shuttled away.

In just an instant, he caught up with the Blood Wolf Tianzun and grabbed it with one hand.

Bang!!!

The Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable was slapped down from the void by Ye Tian, and fell to the ground with heavy injuries, and the top-level supreme treasure floating wing also cracked.

Wow!

Ye Tian stopped flying and landed in front of the Blood Wolf Tianzun.

"Supreme Lord, please spare your life!"

Blood Wolf Tianzun begged for mercy.

In the bottom of his heart, he already thought that Ye Tian was the Supreme, and as for cultivation, it was probably fake, but he used a secret method that he didn't know, and he couldn't sense it.

"I'm not the Supreme, I'm just the Juggernaut!"

Ye Tiandao.

Blood Wolf Tianzun did not refute, but desperately begged for mercy.

No matter what kind of cultivation Ye Tian is, anyway, he can't fight it, only by begging for mercy can he live.

"I said, I don't want to waste time, so, you better die!"

Ye Tian slapped the Blood Wolf Tianzun to death, and then used his constant light magic power to return to the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group.

......

"Lord Fa Tianjug, are you alright?"

Lord Yunlan asked.

"It's okay!" Ye Tian said lightly: "This is the stuff of the Blood Wolf Tianzun, give it to you!"

Ye Tian threw the cracked floating wings and the Blood Wolf Heavenly Venerable's Void Mina Ring to the Yunlan Lord.

"Fa Tian Juggernaut, these things are too precious, I can't ask for them!"

Lord Yunlan hurriedly excused himself.

"These things are of little use to me, if you don't want them, then throw them away!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Then I'll still accept it!" Lord Yunlan was reluctant to throw away these good things, and immediately said, "Thank you Lord Fa Tian for saving your life!"

"It's nothing!" Ye Tian waved his hand, "I want to know more about the misty area, can the Yunlan Lord also tell me some secrets, such as the situation in the internal area and the core area!"

"Absolutely!"

Yun Lan dominated.
